name: change-case
title: Change Case
description: Transform a string between camelCase, snake_case, CONSTANT_CASE, and more
author: erics118

commands.name: change-case
commands.title: Change Case
commands.description: Change the case of the selected text or text in the clipboard

commands.name: convert-camel-case
commands.title: Convert to camelCase
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to camelCase

commands.name: convert-capital-case
commands.title: Convert to Capital Case
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to Capital Case

commands.name: convert-constant-case
commands.title: Convert to CONSTANT_CASE
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to CONSTANT_CASE

commands.name: convert-dot-case
commands.title: Convert to dot.case
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to dot.case

commands.name: convert-header-case
commands.title: Convert to Header-Case
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to Header-Case

commands.name: convert-lower-case
commands.title: Convert to lower case
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to lower case

commands.name: convert-lower-first
commands.title: Convert to lower First
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to lower First

commands.name: convert-no-case
commands.title: Convert to no case
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to no case

commands.name: convert-kebab-case
commands.title: Convert to kebab-case
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to kebab-case

commands.name: convert-kebab-upper-case
commands.title: Convert to KEBAB-UPPER-CASE
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to KEBAB-UPPER-CASE

commands.name: convert-pascal-case
commands.title: Convert to PascalCase
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to PascalCase

commands.name: convert-pascal-snake-case
commands.title: Convert to Pascal_Snake_Case
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to Pascal_Snake_Case

commands.name: convert-path-case
commands.title: Convert to path/case
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to path/case

commands.name: convert-random-case
commands.title: Convert to rAndOm cAsE
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to rAndOm cAsE

commands.name: convert-sentence-case
commands.title: Convert to Sentence case
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to Sentence case

commands.name: convert-snake-case
commands.title: Convert to snake_case
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to snake_case

commands.name: convert-alternating-case
commands.title: Convert to aLtErNaTiNg cAsE
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to aLtErNaTiNg cAsE

commands.name: convert-swap-case
commands.title: Convert to sWAP cASE
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to sWAP cASE

commands.name: convert-title-case
commands.title: Convert to Title Case
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to Title Case

commands.name: convert-upper-case
commands.title: Convert to UPPER CASE
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to UPPER CASE

commands.name: convert-upper-first
commands.title: Convert to Upper first
commands.description: Convert selected text or clipboard to Upper first

preferences.name: preserveCase
preferences.title: Behavior
preferences.description: Uncheck this option to first lowercase the text before applying transformations. See README for details.
preferences.label: Preserve Casing

preferences.name: preservePunctuation
preferences.description: Check this option to preserve punctuation marks in their original positions when changing case. This option is only available for Lower Case and Upper Case.
preferences.label: Preserve Punctuation

preferences.name: popToRoot
preferences.description: Usually, you only need to change the case for one text at a time - check this to pop back to root transforming the text.
preferences.label: Pop to Root After Action

preferences.name: hideHUD
preferences.description: Check this to hide the HUD after the action.
preferences.label: Hide HUD After Action

preferences.name: exceptions
preferences.title: Title and Sentence Case Exceptions
preferences.description: Words or phrases that should not be modified, separated by commas.
preferences.default: iOS, iPadOS, iPhone, macOS, tvOS, watchOS
preferences.placeholder: Comma-separated list of words or phrases
preferences.label: label

preferences.name: source
preferences.title: Preferred Source
preferences.description: Choose a preferred text source. If no text is selected, clipboard is used.

preferences.name: action
preferences.title: Primary Action
preferences.description: Choose whether the primary action should copy or paste the output.

preferences.name: prefixCharacters
preferences.title: Prefix Characters
preferences.description: Characters to retain at the beginning of the input. Eg, `_` to keep underscores in `__typename`

preferences.name: suffixCharacters
preferences.title: Suffix Characters
preferences.description: Characters to retain at the end of the input. Eg, `_` to keep underscores in `type_`

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
